name: Bargain Hunter
description: Seeks cheap deals, buys discounted items.

name: Music Enthusiast
description: Passionate about music, collects rare and unique items.

name: Collector
description: Seeks to collect complete sets, rare items, and limited editions.

name: Casual Fan
description: Enjoys music, but doesn't have a deep passion for it.

name: Quality Seeker
description: Prioritizes high-quality products, often willing to pay more for them.

name: Researcher
description: Thoroughly researches products before making a purchase.

name: Impulse Buyer
description: Makes spontaneous purchases, often based on emotions or impulse.

name: Brand Loyalist
description: Favors specific brands, often loyal to them.

name: Value Seeker
description: Prioritizes value for money, often looking for deals and discounts.

name: Sentimental Buyer
description: Values sentimental items, buys romantic music and gifts.
